title: Emoscribe AI
description: An intelligent web application that transcribes audio, analyzes the emotional tone of speech, and provides concise AI-powered summaries.
achievements: Audio Transcription: Transcribes audio files (.wav, .mp3, etc.) with high accuracy using the Faster-Whisper model.
Emotion Analysis: Detects dominant emotions in speech (joy, sadness, anger, neutral) via a fine-tuned Wav2Vec2 model.
AI Summarization: Generates concise, human-readable summaries using Google Gemini Pro API.
